notes: Single pytest functional failure where the surface (`AssertionError: Script returned code: 1` at tests/lib/__init__.py:681) hides a network root cause (GitHub 502 Bad Gateway when pip downloads pip-test-package master.zip). flaky_or_transient = true because pytest-rerunfailures retried 3 times. Diagnosis difficulty = medium because the test name (`test_no_truststore_can_install`) suggests truststore as the suspect, but the actual root cause is GitHub returning 502s before truststore code runs.
